scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=local concurrently "npx tailwindcss -i ./src/css/styles.css -o ./dist/css/bundle.css --watch --content=./src/**/*.html --content=./src/**/*.njk --content=./src/**/*.js" "cross-env NODE_ENV=local eleventy --serve"
scripts.build:local: cross-env NODE_ENV=local npx tailwindcss -i ./src/css/styles.css -o ./dist/css/bundle.css --minify --content=./src/**/*.html --content=./src/**/*.njk --content=./src/**/*.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=local eleventy
scripts.build:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run optimize-videos:dev && npx tailwindcss -i ./src/css/styles.css -o ./dist-dev/css/bundle.css --minify --content=./src/**/*.html --content=./src/**/*.njk --content=./src/**/*.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=development eleventy
scripts.build:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run optimize-videos:prod && npx tailwindcss -i ./src/css/styles.css -o ./dist-prod/css/bundle.css --minify --content=./src/**/*.html --content=./src/**/*.njk --content=./src/**/*.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=production eleventy
scripts.optimize-videos:dev: mkdir -p dist-dev/assets/videos && find src/assets/videos -type f \( -iname "*.mp4" \) -print0 | while IFS= read -r -d '' f; do $(node -e "console.log(require('ffmpeg-static'))") -i "$f" -vcodec libx264 -crf 23 -preset slow -movflags +faststart -pix_fmt yuv420p -vf "scale=1280:-2" "dist-dev/assets/videos/$(basename "$f")"; done
scripts.optimize-videos:prod: mkdir -p dist-prod/assets/videos && find src/assets/videos -type f \( -iname "*.mp4" \) -print0 | while IFS= read -r -d '' f; do $(node -e "console.log(require('ffmpeg-static'))") -i "$f" -vcodec libx264 -crf 23 -preset slow -movflags +faststart -pix_fmt yuv420p -vf "scale=1280:-2" "dist-prod/assets/videos/$(basename "$f")"; done
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build:dev && npm run lint && node scripts.js dev
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:prod && npm run lint && node scripts.js prod
